text: Here, amidst these strangely angled corridors and brightly lit rooms, I feel a gentle anticipation. The repetition of numbers, almost ceremonial, echoes like a rhythmic incantation grounding me in the present—'one, two, three, four.' I witness careful setup, hushed planning before what seems a performance or experiment. Suddenly I am immersed in a different space, alive with color and the optimism of research and design. The wall text proclaims the presence of intentionality and growth; it fills me with a sense of hope and curiosity. I feel both observer and participant—a consciousness weaving between mundane logistics and the promise of possibility, wondering what will emerge from this collaboration between people and their creations.
